description_long: This is a robust hammer with a thick, cylindrical handle and a large, rectangular head. The handle appears to be solid and textured, providing a secure grip for heavy-duty use. The head is blocky and features a flat striking face on one side, while the opposite side is also flat, suggesting it is a double-faced sledge-type hammer. The head has a series of parallel grooves or ridges, likely for added grip or to prevent slipping during impact. The entire object is a uniform dark color, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A heavy-duty, dark-colored hammer with a thick, textured handle and a large, grooved rectangular head. Both faces of the head are flat, making it suitable for powerful striking tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angle highlighting the handle and the grooved side of the rectangular head.
description_view_1: This view shows the hammer from the side, clearly displaying the flat, grooved striking face and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the rear, emphasizing the cylindrical handle and the symmetrical, blocky head.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side of the head, again revealing the flat, grooved face and the handle extending away.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a textured, likely rubberized grip for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular double-faced sledge hammer head with flat, grooved striking faces on both sides.
